notes:
- Subagent flat parallel orchestration (nomi_spawn): a lead or companion can now
  fan out independent subtasks that run in parallel, visualized live on the
  canvas; supervised nodes start immediately and Remote spawns are denied.
  Unifies subagent visualization onto a single flat-run base.
- Flat planning path (plan_flat): skip the planner LLM for straightforward
  fan-outs and start execution directly.
- Restricted-role workers: per-node tool allowlists plus gateway narrowing so
  spawned workers only get the tools they need; in-process spawn gating and a
  builtin-tool allowlist (defaults preserve existing behavior).
- Smart orchestration for normal conversations: a global toggle that lets
  ordinary chats automatically fan out subagents.
- Companion session archiving and review: companion conversation windows are
  archived (data model, archiver, context injection) with a review timeline
  ("on this day") and an archive review API; companions gain smart orchestration.
- Provider and API key management improvements: refreshed add-platform and
  key-editor flows, provider cloning, a rotating API client, and
  duplicate-provider detection.
- Windows/Linux system proxy fixes: read the Windows system proxy via the
  registry API, handle WinINet edge cases, detect the proxy on Windows and Linux,
  refresh proxy config for outbound requests, bound detection cost, and remove a
  console flash plus redundant registry reads.
- Tool-argument robustness: tolerate providers that serialize nested tool
  arguments as JSON strings, fixing Spawn and similar tool calls.
- Packaging note: this release publishes the native Windows x64 installer and
  updater assets. macOS and Linux packages are added from their own native build
  machines.
